title: Random Gravity Flipper
description: A mod I created for a youtube video where every 5 minutes, gravity flips a random direction and if a player dies, it speeds up 30 seconds.
body:
## **ABOUT**
Random Gravity Flipper is a mod created by Bubbo based off of [Gravity Changer Unofficial Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/gravity-changer-unofficial-port) that changes gravity to a random direction every 5 minutes.  If a player dies... it speeds up by 30 seconds!

Can you beat the game?

## **Commands**

Start the gravity flipper with 
```
/gravity start
```

**Example of this in action:**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/hB-07m0xpeg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
